project.name: Project Phoenix
project.summary: Core platform migration on schedule. Three major milestones shipped this period with two workstreams progressing as planned.

shipped.title: API v2 Endpoints
shipped.description: All 24 REST endpoints migrated to v2 schema with backward compatibility.

shipped.title: Auth Service Refactor
shipped.description: Replaced legacy auth module with OAuth 2.0 / OIDC flow.

shipped.title: CI/CD Pipeline Overhaul
shipped.description: Migrated build pipelines to GitHub Actions with parallel test execution.
shipped.notes: Build time reduced from 18 min to 6 min.

shipped.title: Dashboard Wireframes Approved
shipped.description: Executive reporting dashboard designs finalized and signed off.

inProgress.title: Data Migration Engine
inProgress.description: Building ETL pipeline for customer data migration from legacy Oracle DB.
inProgress.notes: Schema mapping 90% done; transform layer in progress.

inProgress.title: Reporting Dashboard UI
inProgress.description: Blazor Server implementation of the executive reporting dashboard.

inProgress.title: Load Testing Framework
inProgress.description: Setting up k6-based load testing against staging environment.

carriedOver.title: Notification Service
carriedOver.description: Real-time push notification system for status updates.
carriedOver.notes: Re-scoped to Q3 due to dependency on event bus.
carriedOver.carryOverReason: Blocked on event bus infrastructure — now targeting Q3.

carriedOver.title: Mobile Responsive Layouts
carriedOver.description: Responsive CSS for tablet and mobile viewports.
carriedOver.carryOverReason: De-prioritized; desktop-first approach for executive audience.
